ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of project (e.g., park development, greenway connections) */,
  "specific_projects_impacted" TEXT /* Specific projects impacted by the proposed project */,
  "proposed_reduction" REAL /* Proposed budget reduction for the project */,
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Source of funding for the project (e.g., MPD, REET) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., planning, in progress, completed) */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "current_expenditure" REAL /* Current expenditure on the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department responsible for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for project proposals to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("project_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_type_id") REFERENCES project_types ("project_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_funding_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "project_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "project_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the project type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_types_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "total_funding" REAL /* Total amount of funding available from the source */,
  "allocated_funding" REAL /* Total amount of funding allocated to projects */,
  "remaining_funding" REAL /* Remaining funding available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project proposal */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the proposal */,
  "proposal_date" TEXT /* Date the proposal was submitted */,
  "proposed_total_budget" REAL /* Proposed total budget for the project */,
  "proposed_start_date" TEXT /* Proposed start date of the project */,
  "proposed_end_date" TEXT /* Proposed end date of the project */,
  "proposed_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the proposed project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the proposal (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for the project proposal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_proposals_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project update */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the proposal associated with the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "new_budget" REAL /* New budget after the update */,
  "new_start_date" TEXT /* New start date after the update */,
  "new_end_date" TEXT /* New end date after the update */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status after the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES project_proposals ("proposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, project manager, external stakeholder) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project data */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project manager */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the project manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the project manager belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
